project.name: ether-brain-transport-mqtt
project.description: MQTT transport for EtherBrain — subscribes to a Mosquitto/MQTT broker and triggers the agent runtime on every incoming message. Compatible with any MQTT 3.1.1 broker (Mosquitto, HiveMQ, EMQX, AWS IoT).

project.name: ether-brain-architecture-tests
project.description: Hexagonal agent runtime for building AI agents in Java 21
